title: tabernaemontana micrantha
intro: Tabernaemontana micrantha, also known as the 'Small-flowered Yellow Trumpet', is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana micrantha include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
